widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (20, 32), size = (250, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 0), MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (300, 5), size = (90, 90), png = 1), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (420, 32), size = (400, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 2), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (900, 32), size = (100, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 3), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (1050, 32), size = (100, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 4), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 32)], "itemHeight": 100 }
